---
title: "Mongolia 100"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="mongolia-shell">
  <section class="hero-panel">
    <div class="hero-copy">
      <p class="eyebrow">Daily Mongolia Fact Game</p>
      <h1>Mongolia 100</h1>
      <p class="hero-text">
        Work through 100 Mongolia facts, keep your streak alive, and clear the full trail
        without seeing the same question twice in one cycle.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-chips">
        <span class="chip">100 fact cards</span>
        <span class="chip">No repeats in a run</span>
        <span class="chip">Streak saved locally</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-side">
      <div class="date-badge" id="todayBadge">Loading today's trail...</div>
      <a class="fact-link-card" href="all-games.html">
        <p class="mini-label">All games</p>
        <h2>Browse the game hub and future releases.</h2>
        <p class="motif-note">Use the launcher page to jump between live games and upcoming slots.</p>
      </a>
      <a class="fact-link-card" href="about.html">
        <p class="mini-label">Fact archive</p>
        <h2>Browse all 100 facts on a separate page.</h2>
        <p class="motif-note">Use the archive if you want to study before or after a streak run.</p>
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="stats-strip">
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Current streak</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="streakValue">0</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Best streak</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="bestValue">0</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Progress this cycle</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="progressValue">0 / 100</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Cards left</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="remainingValue">100</p>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="play-grid">
    <article class="game-panel">
      <div class="question-meta">
        <span class="meta-pill" id="categoryPill">Category</span>
        <span class="meta-pill subtle" id="questionIndexPill">Card 1</span>
      </div>
      <h2 id="questionText">Loading question...</h2>
      <p class="question-lead" id="questionLead">
        Pick the best answer. Correct answers grow your streak. Wrong answers reset the streak,
        but the card still retires so you will not see it again in the same run.
      </p>
      <div class="options-grid" id="optionsGrid"></div>
      <div class="feedback-panel" id="feedbackPanel" hidden>
        <p class="feedback-result" id="feedbackResult"></p>
        <p class="feedback-fact" id="feedbackFact"></p>
        <button class="primary-button" id="continueButton" type="button">Next fact</button>
      </div>
      <div class="panel-actions">
        <button class="ghost-button" id="restartButton" type="button">Restart cycle</button>
      </div>
    </article>

    <aside class="info-panel">
      <h3>How it works</h3>
      <ul class="rules-list">
        <li>Each cycle uses all 100 fact cards once.</li>
        <li>Cards never repeat inside a cycle, even after a wrong answer.</li>
        <li>Your streak counts only consecutive correct answers.</li>
        <li>Finishing the deck makes you the winner and unlocks a restart prompt.</li>
        <li>A fresh reshuffle starts the next time you restart a completed run.</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="mini-panel">
        <p class="mini-label">Current run</p>
        <p id="runSummary">Preparing the question trail...</p>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </section>

  <section class="source-panel">
    <p class="eyebrow">Source Notes</p>
    <p>
      Fact prompts were compiled from general reference material on Mongolia, including
      Britannica, UNESCO listings, the CIA World Factbook, and Mongolia-focused culture and
      travel references. The game presents them as short quiz cards rather than quoted source text.
    </p>
  </section>
</div>

<dialog id="winnerDialog" class="winner-dialog">
  <div class="winner-content">
    <p class="eyebrow">Trail Complete</p>
    <h2>You cleared all 100 Mongolia facts.</h2>
    <p id="winnerMessage">
      Your current cycle is complete. Restart to reshuffle the deck and play again.
    </p>
    <div class="winner-actions">
      <button class="primary-button" id="winnerRestartButton" type="button">Restart trail</button>
      <button class="ghost-button" id="winnerCloseButton" type="button">View fact archive</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</dialog>


<script src="game.js"></script>
```
